resources.string: Password must include letters and numbers and be at least 8 characters.
Please enter a valid phone number.
Email must be between 8 and 50 characters and in a valid format.
Name must be 3–50 letters and contain only alphabetic characters.
First and second phone must be different
Thanks for choosing to use the Hyper App in Egypt. We\'re really excited to show you what we have in our restaurants!
We need to access your device\'s location so that we can show you the nearest restaurants and the offers that are most relevant to you.
We would like to send you a notification every now and then to let you know when new offers are available.
To deliver relevant ads to you, we use tracking across other apps and websites — with your permission only, of course. You may opt out of this tracking at any time in your iPhone privacy settings.
Log in to order, use personalised deals and access your personal details.
